---
name: New Skill / Agent / Workflow / Command Proposal
about: Propose an addition to FoundryOS's Modules, Skills, Agents, Workflows, or Commands
title: "[Proposal] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What are you proposing

A Skill, Agent, Workflow, or Command — and the gap it fills. Check [`registry/SKILL_REGISTRY.md`](../../registry/SKILL_REGISTRY.md) and [`registry/AGENT_REGISTRY.md`](../../registry/AGENT_REGISTRY.md) first: most new capabilities fit inside an existing Agent's Skill list rather than needing something new. A new Agent has a higher bar — see [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)'s "How to add an Agent" section for what CBO-Agent had to clear to earn its own mandate.

## Why it's needed

The concrete request shape or use case this would unblock that nothing existing already covers.

## Where it fits

Which Agent would own it, which existing Skills it depends on or overlaps with, and whether it needs a new Workflow or Command, or slots into one that already exists.

## Are you willing to contribute this yourself?

Yes / No — if yes, see [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the exact template and checklist to follow.
